name: Scramblers Golf Club - James Island
about: Scramblers Golf Club is a collection of private member-only indoor golf simulation venues focused on game improvement, access, and community. The facilities offer 24/7 access to simulator bays equipped with best-in-class technology for practice with live swing data or playing rounds on over 100 golf courses. Membership is required, providing an affordable monthly model with recurring access. The James Island location is part of a group with five locations in Charleston, SC and one in Florida, designed to create a modern clubhouse environment for golfers to improve, socialize, and compete.
why_golfers_like_it: Member-based community with leagues and events
Access to over 100+ golf courses and 13 mini-games
Best-in-class Uneekor launch monitors with <1% data accuracy

food_and_drink.notes: Members are allowed to bring in their own food; no in-house kitchen mentioned
Members are allowed to bring in their own drinks (BYOB policy)

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium camera IR-based technology with ball and Refine tech for instant spin analysis

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members must provide their own golf equipment to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are allowed to bring in their own food and drinks; please be respectful and clean up after yourself.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While specific time isn't mentioned, typical simulator rounds take 2-3 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Scramblers is a private member-only club with no specific mentions of child-focused amenities or activities.
